Title: Verify Blog page loads successfully
Preconditions: User has a browser open and internet access
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/blogs/news
Expected Result: Page loads with HTTP 200. Page title shows News and the Sauce Demo header is visible.

Title: Verify page title in browser tab
Preconditions: User navigates to the blog page
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/blogs/news
2. Observe browser tab title
Expected Result: Browser tab displays News – Sauce Demo.

Title: Verify breadcrumb navigation displays correctly
Preconditions: User is on the blog page
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/blogs/news
2. Observe the breadcrumb trail
Expected Result: Breadcrumb shows Home — News with correct links.

Title: Verify breadcrumb Home link navigates to homepage
Preconditions: User is on the blog page
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/blogs/news
2. Click the Home breadcrumb link
Expected Result: User is redirected to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/.

Title: Verify page loads within acceptable time
Preconditions: User has a stable internet connection
Steps:

2. Navigate to https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/blogs/news
3. Record the total page load time
Expected Result: Page fully loads within 3 seconds on a standard broadband connection.
